testcase.name: Login Feature › TS01 - Should successfully log in when providing valid credentials
Login Feature › TS02 - Should display an error alert when credentials are invalid
Login Feature › TS03 - Should display a validation message when submitting with empty fields
Login Feature › TS04 - Should display a validation message when password is empty
Login Feature › TS06 - Should cap email and password fields to a maximum of 30 characters using special chars payload
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › specs\login.spec.ts:70:3 › Login Feature › TS06 - Should cap email and password fields to a maximum of 30 characters using special chars payload
Error: expect(received).toBeLessThanOrEqual(expected)
Expected: <= 30 Received: 246
80 | const domPasswordValue = await passwordLocator.inputValue(); 81 | > 82 | expect(domEmailValue.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(30); | ^ 83 | expect(domPasswordValue.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(30); 84 | 85 | expect(domEmailValue).toBe(longString.substring(0, 30)); at D:\github-projects\playwright_template\e2e\tests\specs\login.spec.ts:82:34
